zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前价格围绕74700上方窄幅波动，整体仍处于短期上升后的整理阶段。价格略高于SMA(20)，显示多头仍占一定优势，但动能不足，市场处于观望状态，趋势偏向震荡偏强。  

从技术指标看，MACD处于零轴下方微弱负值，表明短期动能略偏空，但幅度有限，尚未形成明显下行趋势。RSI数据缺失使超买超卖判断受限，但价格结构显示动能趋缓。  

关键支撑位关注74600附近，即SMA(20)区域，一旦跌破可能测试74700下方低点区域。上方阻力在74950-75000区间，若放量突破，将重新打开上行空间并测试更高压力位。  

操作上建议以区间交易为主，靠近支撑位可轻仓尝试多单，接近阻力位则注意减仓或短空。若出现有效突破或跌破，应顺势跟随，严格设置止损控制风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is showing a subtle bullish consolidation around the $74,700–$74,900 range. Price action remains close to the short-term SMA(20) at $74,691, indicating that the current trend is balanced with neither strong upward nor downward momentum. The narrow daily range between $74,721 and $74,960 suggests low volatility, often a precursor to a breakout. Traders should watch for a decisive move above $74,960 to confirm bullish continuation or below $74,721 to signal short-term weakness.  

The MACD reading at -0.2187 indicates mild bearish pressure, though without a signal line reference, the strength of this momentum is ambiguous. Combined with a minimal 0.07% daily change, the market appears indecisive, likely influenced by profit-taking and consolidation after recent gains. A close above the SMA(20) would reinforce bullish bias, while repeated rejections near current highs may signal the need for short-term caution. Volume analysis could provide further confirmation for any breakout.  

Support is clearly defined near $74,700, a level tested multiple times during the last sessions. A sustained drop below this level could invite sellers toward $74,500–$74,600, the next minor support zone. Resistance stands at $74,960, with stronger barriers near $75,200, marking previous highs where bulls have struggled. Price behavior around these levels will determine whether Bitcoin can extend its upward trend or enter a corrective phase.  

Traders may consider a cautious long approach on a confirmed breakout above $74,960 with stop-losses near $74,700 to manage risk. Conservative strategies might focus on range trading between $74,700–$74,960, targeting smaller, incremental gains. Short-term momentum traders should monitor MACD evolution and any emerging RSI readings for divergence, as these could indicate either a trend continuation or an imminent retracement. The current setup favors measured positions with risk-conscious entries.
